title: Lord Ferrers Awards 2025
body: "The awards highlight the vital role volunteers play in policing through giving up their free time to make communities safer and enhancing the effectiveness of policing across England and Wales.  Nominations open 18 July and close 29 August.  To nominate a volunteer, read the guidance and complete the survey.  If you have any queries or are unable to submit an online application, email lordferrersaward@homeoffice.gov.uk. "
